layers.name: Public API & Client
layers.summary_zh: 对外入口与请求编排：Dio 门面、DioMixin 引擎、平台化 Dio 工厂
layers.summary_en: Public entry & request orchestration — the Dio facade, DioMixin engine, platform Dio factories

classes.name: Dio
classes.description_zh: 对外的抽象 Dio 门面,暴露 get/post/download/request 等方法与全局配置,是库的统一入口。
classes.description_en: The abstract Dio facade — the public client exposing get/post/download/request and global configuration; the library's single entry point.

classes.name: DioMixin
classes.description_zh: 核心请求引擎:构建拦截器 Future 流水线并驱动 request/fetch/_dispatchRequest 的完整执行。
classes.description_en: The core request engine — builds the interceptor Future pipeline and drives request/fetch/_dispatchRequest end to end.

classes.name: _checkNotNullable
classes.signature: T _checkNotNullable<T extends Object>(T value, String name)

classes.name: DioForNative
classes.description_zh: 原生(dart:io)平台的具体 Dio 实现,默认装配 IOHttpClientAdapter。
classes.description_en: Concrete Dio for native (dart:io) platforms, wiring the default IOHttpClientAdapter.

layers.name: Interceptors
layers.summary_zh: 请求/响应中间件链：拦截器、队列拦截器、各类处理器与内置拦截器
layers.summary_en: Request/response middleware chain — interceptors, queued interceptors, handlers and built-ins

classes.name: _BaseHandler
classes.description_zh: 处理器基类,用 Completer 完成 future 以驱动拦截器链向前推进。
classes.description_en: Base handler that completes a Completer future to advance the interceptor chain.

classes.name: RequestInterceptorHandler
classes.description_zh: 请求阶段处理器,供拦截器调用 next/resolve/reject 控制请求走向。
classes.description_en: Request-phase handler letting an interceptor call next/resolve/reject.

classes.name: ResponseInterceptorHandler
classes.description_zh: 响应阶段处理器,供拦截器调用 next/resolve/reject 控制响应走向。
classes.description_en: Response-phase handler letting an interceptor call next/resolve/reject.

classes.name: ErrorInterceptorHandler
classes.description_zh: 错误阶段处理器,供拦截器调用 next/resolve/reject 进行错误恢复或透传。
classes.description_en: Error-phase handler letting an interceptor recover or propagate via next/resolve/reject.

classes.name: Interceptor
classes.description_zh: 拦截器基类,提供 onRequest/onResponse/onError 三个钩子构成请求中间件链。
classes.description_en: Base interceptor exposing onRequest/onResponse/onError hooks that form the request middleware chain.

classes.name: Interceptors
classes.description_zh: 挂在 Dio 实例上的有序拦截器列表(含内置拦截器的增删 API)。
classes.description_en: The ordered interceptor list attached to a Dio instance (with add/remove APIs for built-ins).

classes.name: QueuedInterceptor
classes.description_zh: 将回调串行化进任务队列的拦截器变体,保证 FIFO 顺序处理。
classes.description_en: Interceptor variant that serializes callbacks through a task queue for FIFO processing.

classes.name: ImplyContentTypeInterceptor
classes.description_zh: 内置拦截器,根据请求体类型自动推断并设置 Content-Type。
classes.description_en: Built-in interceptor that infers and sets Content-Type from the request body.

classes.name: LogInterceptor
classes.description_zh: 内置拦截器,打印请求/响应/错误的诊断日志。
classes.description_en: Built-in interceptor that logs requests, responses and errors.

layers.name: Request & Response Model
layers.summary_zh: 请求与响应的数据模型：Options/Headers/Parameter/Response 及其流式处理
layers.summary_en: The request/response data model — Options, Headers, Parameter, Response and its streaming

classes.name: Headers
classes.description_zh: 大小写不敏感的 HTTP 头部映射。
classes.description_en: Case-insensitive HTTP header map.

classes.name: OptionsMixin
classes.description_zh: 被 BaseOptions/RequestOptions 共用的选项字段 mixin。
classes.description_en: Shared option fields mixed into BaseOptions/RequestOptions.

classes.name: BaseOptions
classes.description_zh: 实例级基础配置(baseUrl、headers、超时等),会合并进每个请求。
classes.description_en: Per-instance base config (baseUrl, headers, timeouts) merged into every request.

classes.name: Options
classes.description_zh: 单次调用的请求覆盖项,叠加在 BaseOptions 之上。
classes.description_en: Per-call request overrides merged on top of BaseOptions.

classes.name: RequestOptions
classes.description_zh: 引擎与适配器消费的、已完全解析的单次请求配置。
classes.description_en: The fully-resolved per-request configuration the engine and adapter consume.

classes.name: _RequestConfig
classes.description_zh: 支撑各 Options 类的内部配置载体。
classes.description_en: Internal config holder backing the Options classes.

classes.name: Response
classes.description_zh: 响应模型,封装解码后的数据、状态码、响应头与重定向记录。
classes.description_en: The response model wrapping decoded data, status code, headers and redirect records.

classes.name: handleResponseStream
classes.signature: Stream<Uint8List> handleResponseStream( RequestOptions options, ResponseBody response, { @visibleForTesting void Function()? onReceiveTimeoutWatchCancelled, })

layers.name: Data Transformers
layers.summary_zh: 请求体编码与响应体解码的转换器（含后台 Isolate 与融合实现）
layers.summary_en: Transformers that encode request bodies and decode response bodies (incl. background Isolate / fused)

classes.name: Transformer
classes.description_zh: 抽象转换器:在收发前编码请求体、解码响应体。
classes.description_en: Abstract transformer that encodes request bodies and decodes response bodies before send/receive.

classes.name: BackgroundTransformer
classes.description_zh: 在后台 isolate 中解码 JSON 的转换器。
classes.description_en: Transformer that decodes JSON in a background isolate.

classes.name: FusedTransformer
classes.description_zh: 默认转换器,带 UTF8+JSON 融合快路径,大响应体可切换到 isolate 解码。
classes.description_en: Default transformer with a fused UTF8+JSON fast path, offloading large bodies to an isolate.

classes.name: SyncTransformer
classes.description_zh: 在当前 isolate 内同步编解码的转换器。
classes.description_en: Transformer that encodes/decodes synchronously in the current isolate.

classes.name: DefaultNullIfEmptyStreamTransformer
classes.description_zh: 把空字节流映射为 null 的流转换器。
classes.description_en: Stream transformer mapping an empty byte stream to null.

layers.name: FormData & Multipart
layers.summary_zh: 表单与文件上传载荷：FormData 编排与跨平台 MultipartFile
layers.summary_en: Form & file-upload payloads — FormData assembly and cross-platform MultipartFile

classes.name: FormData
classes.description_zh: multipart/form-data 构建器,把字段与文件组装成带边界的可发送字节流(finalize)。
classes.description_en: multipart/form-data builder assembling fields and files into a finalized, sendable byte stream.

classes.name: MultipartFile
classes.description_zh: 单个 multipart 文件部件(字节/流 + 头部),用于文件上传。
classes.description_en: A single multipart file part (bytes/stream + headers) for file upload.

classes.name: multipartFileFromPath
classes.signature: Future<MultipartFile> multipartFileFromPath( String filePath, { String? filename, DioMediaType? contentType, final Map<String, List<String>>? headers, })

classes.name: multipartFileFromPathSync
classes.signature: MultipartFile multipartFileFromPathSync( String filePath, { String? filename, DioMediaType? contentType, final Map<String, List<String>>? headers, })

layers.name: Transport Adapters (SPI)
layers.summary_zh: 传输适配 SPI：HttpClientAdapter 抽象与 IO/浏览器内置适配器、ResponseBody
layers.summary_en: Transport adapter SPI — the HttpClientAdapter abstraction, IO/browser adapters, ResponseBody

classes.name: HttpClientAdapter
classes.description_zh: 传输 SPI:通过 fetch() 把 Dio 桥接到真正的 HttpClient,是自定义传输的扩展点。
classes.description_en: The transport SPI — bridges Dio to a real HttpClient via fetch(); the extension point for custom transports.

classes.name: ResponseBody
classes.description_zh: 适配器返回的原始响应(状态码、头部、字节流),转换前的中间结果。
classes.description_en: The raw adapter response (status, headers, byte stream) before transformation.

classes.name: IOHttpClientAdapter
classes.description_zh: 基于 dart:io HttpClient 的默认原生适配器。
classes.description_en: Default native adapter built on dart:io HttpClient.

layers.name: Adapter Plugins
layers.summary_zh: 官方插件生态：HTTP/2、原生(cronet/cupertino)、Web、Cookie 管理与 http 兼容层
layers.summary_en: First-party plugin ecosystem — HTTP/2, native (cronet/cupertino), web, cookie manager, http compat

classes.name: ConversionLayerAdapter
classes.description_zh: 把任意 package:http Client 包装成 Dio 适配器的兼容层。
classes.description_en: Compatibility layer wrapping any package:http Client as a Dio adapter.

classes.name: CookieManager
classes.description_zh: 基于 CookieJar 持久化并自动附带 Cookie 的拦截器。
classes.description_en: Interceptor that persists and auto-attaches cookies via CookieJar.

classes.name: ConnectionManager
classes.description_zh: HTTP/2 连接池抽象,定义连接复用策略。
classes.description_en: Abstract HTTP/2 connection pool defining the connection-reuse strategy.

classes.name: _ConnectionManager
classes.description_zh: 默认 HTTP/2 连接池实现,带空闲超时回收。
classes.description_en: Default HTTP/2 connection pool implementation with idle-timeout reclamation.

classes.name: Http2Adapter
classes.description_zh: 实现 HTTP/2 的适配器,支持连接复用与向 IO 适配器降级回退。
classes.description_en: HttpClientAdapter implementing HTTP/2, with connection reuse and fallback to the IO adapter.

classes.name: ConversionLayerAdapter
classes.description_zh: 把 Dio 请求翻译为 package:http 请求的转换层(native 适配器复用 http 客户端)。
classes.description_en: Conversion layer translating Dio requests into package:http requests (native adapters reuse the http client).

classes.name: CronetAdapter
classes.description_zh: 基于 Cronet 的 Android 原生适配器。
classes.description_en: Native Android adapter backed by Cronet.

classes.name: CupertinoAdapter
classes.description_zh: 基于 Cupertino/NSURLSession 的 iOS/macOS 原生适配器。
classes.description_en: Native iOS/macOS adapter backed by Cupertino/NSURLSession.

classes.name: NativeAdapter
classes.description_zh: 按平台选择的原生适配器(Android 用 Cronet、Apple 用 Cupertino)。
classes.description_en: Platform-selecting native adapter (Cronet on Android, Cupertino on Apple).

classes.name: BrowserHttpClientAdapter
classes.description_zh: 基于浏览器 XMLHttpRequest/fetch 的 Web 传输适配器。
classes.description_en: Web transport adapter using the browser's XMLHttpRequest/fetch.

classes.name: compute
classes.signature: Future<R> compute<Q, R>( c.ComputeCallback<Q, R> callback, Q message, { String? debugLabel, })

classes.name: DioForBrowser
classes.description_zh: Web 平台的具体 Dio 实现,由 web_adapter 插件提供。
classes.description_en: Concrete Dio for web platforms, provided by the web_adapter plugin.

classes.name: _triggerBrowserDownload
classes.signature: void _triggerBrowserDownload({ required Uint8List bytes, required String filename, String? contentType, })

classes.name: multipartFileFromPath
classes.signature: Never multipartFileFromPath( String filePath, { String? filename, MediaType? contentType, final Map<String, List<String>>? headers, })

classes.name: multipartFileFromPathSync
classes.signature: Never multipartFileFromPathSync( String filePath, { String? filename, MediaType? contentType, final Map<String, List<String>>? headers, })

classes.name: addProgress
classes.signature: Stream<Uint8List> addProgress( Stream<List<int>> stream, int? length, RequestOptions options, )

classes.name: _transform
classes.signature: StreamTransformer<S, Uint8List> _transform<S extends List<int>>( Stream<S> stream, int? length, RequestOptions options, )

layers.name: Cancellation & Errors
layers.summary_zh: 请求生命周期控制：CancelToken 取消与 DioException 异常体系
layers.summary_en: Request lifecycle control — CancelToken cancellation and the DioException error hierarchy

classes.name: CancelToken
classes.description_zh: 请求取消令牌:调用 cancel() 完成 whenCancel,中止绑定该令牌的请求。
classes.description_en: Cancellation token; cancel() completes whenCancel to abort requests bound to it.

classes.name: DioException
classes.description_zh: 统一错误类型,涵盖超时、badResponse、cancel 等所有 dio 失败场景。
classes.description_en: Unified error type covering all dio failures — timeout, badResponse, cancel, etc.

layers.name: Progress & Utilities
layers.summary_zh: 上传/下载进度流、跨平台 compute 隔离与通用工具
layers.summary_en: Upload/download progress streams, cross-platform compute isolation and shared utilities

classes.name: encodeMap
classes.signature: String encodeMap( Object data, DioEncodeHandler handler, { bool encode = true, bool isQuery = false, ListFormat listFormat = ListFormat.multi, })

classes.name: compute
classes.signature: Future<R> compute<Q, R>( c.ComputeCallback<Q, R> callback, Q message, { String? debugLabel, })

classes.name: computeWithTimeout
classes.signature: Future<R> computeWithTimeout<Q, R>( c.ComputeCallback<Q, R> callback, Q message, { String? debugLabel, Duration? timeout, })
classes.description_zh: 在新 isolate 中带超时地运行一个函数(原生 compute)。
classes.description_en: Runs a function in a spawned isolate with a timeout (native compute).

classes.name: _IsolateConfiguration
classes.description_zh: 描述 isolate 任务及其参数的载荷对象。
classes.description_en: Payload describing the isolate task and its arguments for compute.

classes.name: computeWithTimeout
classes.signature: Future<R> computeWithTimeout<Q, R>( c.ComputeCallback<Q, R> callback, Q message, { String? debugLabel, Duration? timeout, })

classes.name: addProgress
classes.signature: Stream<Uint8List> addProgress( Stream<List<int>> stream, int? length, RequestOptions options, )

classes.name: _transform
classes.signature: StreamTransformer<S, Uint8List> _transform<S extends List<int>>( Stream<S> stream, int? length, RequestOptions options, )

flows.name_zh: 一次请求的完整生命周期
flows.description_zh: 从 dio.get() 到拿到 Response:DioMixin 串起请求拦截器、Transformer 编码、HttpClientAdapter 发送、解码、响应拦截器,最终返回。
flows.description_en: From dio.get() to a Response — DioMixin threads request interceptors, Transformer encoding, the HttpClientAdapter, decoding, and response interceptors before returning.

flows.description_zh: fetch 把每个拦截器串成 FIFO Future 链;Handler 通过 next/resolve/reject 控制走向,QueuedInterceptor 还会把回调入队串行执行。
flows.description_en: fetch threads each interceptor into a FIFO Future chain; handlers steer it via next/resolve/reject, and QueuedInterceptor serializes callbacks through a queue.

steps.label_zh: 完成 future,进入下一拦截器

flows.description_zh: _dispatchRequest 调用 HttpClientAdapter.fetch,根据装配的适配器分发到 dart:io、HTTP/2、原生(Cronet/Cupertino)或浏览器传输,统一返回 ResponseBody。
flows.description_en: _dispatchRequest calls HttpClientAdapter.fetch, dispatching to the wired adapter — dart:io, HTTP/2, native (Cronet/Cupertino) or browser — and returns a unified ResponseBody.

flows.description_zh: Transformer 在收发前后编解码报文:默认 FusedTransformer 走 UTF8+JSON 融合快路径,大响应体经 computeWithTimeout 切到 isolate 解码。
flows.description_en: Transformers encode/decode payloads around send/receive — the default FusedTransformer takes a fused UTF8+JSON fast path and offloads large bodies to an isolate via computeWithTimeout.

flows.description_zh: FormData 把字段与 MultipartFile 文件部件按 boundary 组装成 multipart/form-data 字节流,经进度流包裹后交给适配器发送。
flows.description_en: FormData assembles fields and MultipartFile parts into a multipart/form-data byte stream by boundary, wraps it with a progress stream, and hands it to the adapter.

flows.description_zh: CancelToken.cancel() 完成 whenCancel,触发 CancelableOperation 中止底层传输,并构造 cancel 类型的 DioException 抛回调用方。
flows.description_en: CancelToken.cancel() completes whenCancel, which aborts the underlying CancelableOperation and raises a cancel-type DioException back to the caller.

steps.label_zh: 构造 cancel 类型 DioException
